programme.title: Love Hacks
programme.desc: Opinionated strait-laced Sam is starting a new podcast on relationships. Talented easy going producer Josh has been asked to help her. Can they set their differences aside to make romance blossom?

programme.title: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: Jaded designer Lauren decides to move back home after three years trying to make her career in Seattle. Lauren soon finds out that the city has more to offer then she could have imagined. (2020)

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: (2022) Romance with Ashley Newbrough and Eric Lutz. While back in her hometown to finish her book, a novelist helps her ex save the town's historic ballroom - but can she write her own happy ending?

programme.title: Love, Game, Match
programme.desc: (2021) Romance with Cristine Prosperi and Dale Moss. New-in-town teacher Liz agrees to help test her students' matchmaking website - so will it be singles or doubles when she meets tennis coach Ted?

programme.title: Love By Design
programme.desc: (2023) Magical romance with Jackie Moore. On her 30th birthday, heartbroken Brooke wishes for everything on her teenage vision board to come true. But when it does, will life have a different plan?

programme.title: Law Of Attraction
programme.desc: Allison Williams, a young female attorney, tries to impress her law firm partners in an attempt to make partner with her first big case.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: (2023) Flavourful romance starring Laura Miyata and David Lafontaine. An NYC baker would love to land a cookbook deal. Will a dash of royalty and a spoonful of romance help fulfil her dream?

programme.title: Sweet Home Carolina
programme.desc: (2017) Romantic comedy starring Heather McComb. A stressed-out single mum moves to South Carolina to claim an inherited house, where unexpected love and Southern charm await.

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: Falling for the Competition
programme.desc: (2023) Romcom rivalry starring Francesca Barker McCormick and Michael Joseph Nelson. It's mums vs. dads as two parenting groups compete for an award - but will love take their eyes off the prize?

programme.title: Butlers In Love
programme.desc: (2022) Christmas rom com with Stacey Faber. Sparks fly at the American Butler Academy as chalk and cheese students Emma and Henry clash. In learning to work together might they fall for each other?

programme.title: Splash of Love
programme.desc: (2022) Aquatic rom com with Rhiannon Fish. Out in the Pacific Northwest to study orcas, can Chloe find love with the help of local whale spotting guide Ben and not feel like a fish out of water?

programme.title: Two Chefs and A Wedding Cake
programme.desc: (2022) Foodie fun romance. Sparks fly for a food critic at her sister's wedding when she clashes with a chef infamous for banning reviewers from his restaurant. Can they turn rivalry into romance?

programme.title: Date with Love
programme.desc: (2016) Romance with Shenae Grimes-Beech. A small-town boy's proposal goes viral and scores him a prom date with a celebrity - but falling for the boy's teacher wasn't the plan.

programme.title: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: Chole wishes to bring her college friends back together for a trip to Iceland. Will an unexpected guest and seeing the northern lights, give her the new perspective on life and love? (2020)

programme.title: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: City lawyer Claire returns home to save her a family's pumpkin farm over a property dispute. The opposing lawyer is Patrick, her high school debate class nemesis. (2019)
